extracted_information: ipapi.co offers an IP Address Lookup and Geolocation API, described as powerful, simple, and REST-based. No sign-up is required to get started with the free tier. The service is trusted by many customers, known for accuracy and quality support. It supports various payment methods including Credit/Debit Card, PayPal, Apple Pay, ACH, Cheque, and Cryptocurrencies (Bitcoin, Litecoin, Altcoins), with all prices in USD. The service boasts a hassle-free cancellation policy and uses a secure, PCI compliant payment provider (Stripe, PCI Level 1). Its infrastructure is built on AWS, ensuring high availability and scalability. ipapi.co provides 365-day customer support, with tickets reviewed by qualified developers. It offers comprehensive IPv4 & IPv6 coverage, with its database updated daily. Key use cases include automatic detection of user location, content customization, visitor redirection, external IP lookup, location display on maps, bulk IP lookup, and filtering bad bots/crawlers.

pricing.ip_lookup_definition: Finding the geographical location (or related information like currency, timezone etc.) of an IP address. Each conversion of an IP address to location counts as a lookup (repeat queries of the same IP address count as separate lookups).

free_plan.name: Standard Features
features: Suitable for testing / development (not for production use)
Standard Privacy (IP queries stored in logs)
free_plan.access_details: No credit card required. Basic fields accessible without sign-up.

paid_plan.name: Premium Features
features: Usage alerts (email warnings before quota runs out)
Enhanced Privacy (contact to bypass IP query logging)
paid_plan.authentication: API key provided upon sign-up, included as query string in requests.
paid_plan.plan_management: Can change plan anytime from account dashboard. Upgrades apply instantly. Downgrades take effect from new billing cycle.

features: HTTPS / SSL Secure API (for all plans)
API for usage monitoring (for paid plans)
Bulk IP lookup (GUI tool, full for paid, limited for free)
No sign-up required (for basic free use)
Free tier for testing and development
Support for multiple output formats (JSON, JSONP, XML, CSV, YAML)
Customization of content based on geographical location
Redirection of visitors to region/country specific websites
Display user's location on a map
Filtering bad bots & crawlers based on region/country

geographical_data.accuracy_level: Accuracy ranges from city to postal code level
geographical_data.coverage: One of the most comprehensive IPv4 & IPv6 coverage
